# David Vique — Full-Stack Developer & Engineer

> Portfolio: https://david-dev-portfolio-2026.vercel.app

## About

David Vique is a multi-disciplinary full-stack developer and software engineer based in Ecuador.
He specializes in building complete, production-grade products — frontend, backend, infrastructure,
and AI automation — as a solo developer who owns every layer of the stack.

With 5+ years of experience and 9+ products shipped, he has worked across enterprise AI systems,
learning management platforms, CRM tools, and cloud-native web applications.

He also co-authored a research paper published at Springer BICA 2023 (Vol. 1130).

## Skills & Technologies

- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, Three.js
- **Backend:** NestJS, Node.js, Express, TypeORM, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- **Infrastructure:** AWS Lambda, S3, RDS, SST v4, Docker, GitHub Actions, CloudFront
- **AI / Automation:** OpenAI, LangChain, N8N, Whisper, mem0, Qdrant, OCR pipelines
- **Other:** Unity (3D/Game), Moodle (LMS), TypeScript, Python

## Selected Projects

- **UMI** — AI meeting intelligence platform. Records, transcribes, and analyzes meetings. Built with Next.js, NestJS, OpenAI, AWS Lambda, PostgreSQL, S3.
- **BMC** — Section 125 benefits platform. React 19 SPA on AWS S3 + CloudFront, serverless Lambda functions, streaming AI chat widget, Resend email delivery.
- **N8N Multi-client** — Self-hosted N8N chatbots, one per customer, orchestrating LLM conversations with isolated pipelines and guardrails.
- **3D Portfolio** — Interactive Three.js WebGL experience with custom shaders and physics.
- **Shooter Game Research** — Published paper (Springer, BICA 2023, Vol. 1130) on motion-tracking and shot-detection algorithms for real-time video analysis.

## Availability

Available for new projects — freelance, contract, and full-time engagements.
